title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the HDFC Bank Global Group family as a Investment Banker in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HDFC Bank Global Group:
HDFC Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank Global Group!
